ingredients_text: Tomato Sauce (67.5%) (Tomatoes (31.5%) {Tomatoes, Food acid (330), Firming agent (509)}, Beef (11%), Vegetables {Onion, Carrot, Red Capsicum}, Water, Tomato Paste, Apple Juice Concentrate, Sundried Tomatoes (Natural Flavours), Cornflour, Cheese (Milk), Vegetable Oil, Garlic, Herbs, Yeast Extract (Natural Flavour)), Macaroni Pasta (26.5%) (Water, Wheat Semolina), Cheese {6% (Milk)}.
